face.text: Sensation as of flies crawling over face. Erysipelas. Great sensibility of teeth
Sensations as if flies were crawling over r. side of face. Erysipelatous swelling of face and head; face feels hot and swollen; is compelled to rub the eyes. Pain as if bruised in l. malar bone.
Sensation as if flies were crawling over right side of face. Erysipelatous swelling of face and head ; hot face ; it feels swollen ; is compelled to rub the eyes.

mouth_throat.text: Sore; dark livid redness of fauces and tonsils. Sticking pain. Mucus in throat and hawking. Tickling, with dry cough

Great sensibility of teeth; l. side and in upper teeth; slightest draught of cold air induces it; cold drinks very painful. Tongue coated bluish-white. Burning, drawing, and scraping; burning in roof of mouth, extending to mouth and tonsils. Sore throat, dark, livid redness of fauces and tonsils. R. tonsil inflamed, purple. Stitching and shooting in throat. Mucus in throat and frequent hawking.

Great sensibility of teeth ; < on left side and in upper teeth ; slightest draught of cold air causes toothache ; cold drink very painful. Tongue coated bluish-white. Burning, drawing and scraping ; burning in roof of mouth, extending to uvula and tonsils. Inflammation and purple color of right tonsil. Sore throat, dark livid redness of fauces and tonsils. Sticking and shooting in throat. Mucus in throat and frequent hawking.

keynotes.text: color="#800000">GYMNOCLADUS CANADENSIS American Coffee-tree (GYMNOCLADUS) Sore throat, dark livid redness of fauces, and erysipelatous swelling of face are most marked. Hives. Desire for heat and quiet. Headache, throbbing in forehead and temples and over eyes, with bluish-white coating of tongue. Burning in eyes.

The most peculiar symptom of the Gymnocl. proving is a bluish-white coating of the tongue. Guided by this symptom C. T. Bingham cured a man of headache following influenza "a constant severe pain in front part of head, especially under eyebrows and upper part of nose." It had lasted over two weeks, never ceasing and at times intolerable. Bones of eye-sockets sore to touch. Tongue covered all over with bluish-white coat; does not enjoy food; is very weak. Gym. 2x cured. Full, tight headache appears in the proving, with sensation as if the eyes were pushed forward. The fulness takes actual shape in "erysipelatous swelling of face and head; hot face; it feels swollen; is compelled to rub the eyes." Full sensations and burning pains are very common. Toothache from slightest cold air or drink. Sore throat, dark livid redness of fauces and tonsils. There are a number of fever symptoms: Desire for heat, wants to be near the fire. Cold chills and pains in bowels. Perspiration in axillary regions and palms. Epidemic fevers of typhoid character have been cured by it. Violent pain in left forearm as if the bones were crushed. There is aversion to motion; easily fatigued; desire to lean the head on something. Walking . Cold , cold drinks and cold draughts . > From rubbing eyes.

Text Book of Materia Medica. By Adolph Lippe, M. D. Professor of Materia Medica at the Homopathic College of Pennsylvania. Presented by Médi-T. Gymnocladus canadensis. Mind and Disposition. Indifference to what happens around him. Cannot think, comprehend or study ; forgets every thing. Head. Dizziness with dimness of sight ; nausea, belching. Head feels full, tight, as if bound up. [5] Fulness and pressure in and over the eyes, extending to the top of the head. Throbbing headache over the left eye. Pain in the head and back. Pain in the left temple to the ear and top of the head. Bruised feeling of the head (left side). [10] Desire to lean the head on something. Eyes. Pain in the left eyeball and temple. Eyes feel as if pushed forward. Eyes feel sore in the morning. Face. Sensation as if flies were crawling over the right side of the face. [15] Erysipelatous swelling of the face and head ; hot face ; it feels swollen ; is compelled to rub the eyes. Nose. Frequent violent sneezing, originating very high up in the nose. Mouth and Throat. Great sensibility of the teeth ; more on the left side and in the upper teeth ; the slightest draught of cold air causes toothache ; cold drink is very painful. Tongue coated bluish-white. Burning, drawing and scraping ; burning in the roof of the mouth, extending to the uvula and tonsils. [20] Inflammation and purple color of the right tonsil. Sticking and shooting in the throat. Burning in the sophagus and stomach. Mucus in the throat and frequent hawking. Stomach and Abdomen. Nausea after eating, with pain and fulness in stomach and belching. [25] Belching of sour water. Burning in the stomach (circumscribed, the size of a dollar). Heat in the stomach and sour watery eructations. Pain in the left side, as if the spleen were swollen. Stitches in the bowels and umbilical region. [30] Soreness and tenderness of the abdomen. Stool and Anus. Constipation, with ineffectual disposition to go to stool. After stool, aching fulness in the rectum. Urinary Organs. Pressure on the bladder and frequent desire to urinate ; the urine is passed in a small stream. Sexual Organs. Man . Itching of the glans penis and prepuce. Respiratory Organs. [35] Smarting in the larynx. In the morning, tickling in the throat, causing a cough, increasing through the day ; cough hard, dry and racking. Pressure on the chest and sternum. Stitches in the right breast and intercostal muscles. Extremities. Upper . Perspiration of the axillary region and palms of the hands. [40] Violent pain in the left forearm, in the radius, as if the bones were crushed and broken. Pulsation in the left index, as if a panaritium were forming. Lower . Stinging pain in the left knee-joint. Fever. Pulse small and quick. Cold chills and pains in the bowels (in the descending colon). [45] Desire for increased heat ; wants to be near the fire. Conditions. Aggravation in the evening. Repugnance to motion ; a short walk fatigues him much (afternoon). The whole body feels numb. Copyright © Médi-T 2006

generalities.text: Clinical: Erysipelas; Fever; Headache; Spleen, pain in; Throat, sore; Tongue, blue; Toothache; Whitlow

Smarting in larynx. Tickling in throat in morning causing cough, increasing through day; cough dry, hard, and racking. Pressure on chest and sternum. Violent pain in l. forearm, in radius, as if bones were crushed and broken. Pulsation in l. index finger as if panaritium were forming. Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Main.

Repugnance to motion ; a short walk in afternoon fatigues him much. At times stitches in umbilical region. Frequent sneezing. Right : sensation as if flies were crawling on side of face ; inflammation and purple color of tonsil ; stitches in breast. Left : throbbing headache over eye ; pain in temple to ear ; bruised feeling of head ; pain in eyeball ; sensibility of teeth ; pain in side as if spleen were swollen ; violent pain in forearm ; pulsation in index finger ; stinging pain in. knee-joint. Head feels as if bound up ; eyes feel as if pushed forward ; as if flies were crawling over right side of face ; as if spleen were swollen ; as if bones of forearm were crushed and broken ; pulsation in left index as if panisitium were forming. Pain : in left temple to ear and top of head ; in head and back ; in left eyeball ; in temple ; through eyes ; in stomach ; in left side ; in bowels. Violent pain : in left forearm ; in radius. Intense frontal headache. Stitches : in bowels ; in umbilical region ; in breast and intercostal muscles. Sticking : in throat. Stinging pain : in left knee-joint. Shooting : through head to right side ; in throat. Throbbing headache : over left eye ; in temples. Burning heat : in eyes ; in roof of mouth ; in œsophagus ; in stomach. Circumscribed burning : in stomach. Heat : in face ; in stomach. Aching fulness : in rectum. Drawing : in roof of mouth. Bruised feeling : of head ; left side. Tenderness : of abdomen. Great sensibility of teeth. Sore feeling : in eyes ; in throat ; in abdomen. Smarting : in larynx. Tickling : in larynx. Scraping : in roof of mouth. Swollen feeling of face. Fulness : in and over eyes ; in stomach. Head feels full, tight. Pressure : in and over eyes ; on bladder ; on chest and sternum. Numbness and tired feeling. Itching : of glans penis and prepuce.

mental_emotional.text: Cannot think, comprehend, or study; forgets everything. Indifference.
Cannot think, comprehend or study ; forgets everything. Indifference to what happens around him. Dizziness with dimness of sight ; nausea, belching. Head feels full, tight, as if bound up.

head.text: Dizzy with dimness of sight; nausea, belching. Head feels full, tight as if bound up. Intense frontal headache, eyes feel pushed forward. Fulness and pressure in and over eyes, extending to vertex. Intense headache with stitches in bowels; in umbilical region at times. Catarrhal headache, premonitory stages; feeling of fulness in head, with throbbing in temples and forehead, with vertigo, heat of face, numbness and tired feeling. Desire to lean the head on something.

Intense frontal headache, eyes feel as if pushed forward. Fulness and pressure in and over, eyes, extending to top of head. Throbbing headache over left eye. Pain in left temple to ear and top of head, shooting through to right side. Bruised feeling of head, left side. Pain in head and back. Intense headache, with stitches in bowels ; in umbilical region at times. Catarrhal headaches, premonitory stages ; feeling of fulness in head, with throbbing in temples and forehead, with vertigo, heat of face, numbness and tired feeling. Desire to lean the head on something.

eyes.text: Eyes feel pushed forward. Burning heat and pain through eyes; sore in morning. Desire to rub the eyes. Sense of agglutination of l. eye; desire to rub or scratch it. Violent throbbing pain over l. eye.
Eyes feel as if pushed forward. Pain in left eyeball and temple. Burning heat and pain through eyes. Eyes feel sore in morning.

stomach_abdomen.text: Belching of sour water. Nausea after eating with pain and fulness in stomach and belching. Burning in œsophagus and stomach. Circumscribed burning in stomach size of dollar. Pain in l. side as if spleen were swollen. Soreness and tenderness of abdomen. Stitches in bowels and umbilical region.

Belching of sour water. Nausea after eating, with pain and fulness in stomach, and belching. Burning in œsophagus and stomach. Heat in stomach and sour, watery eructations. Circumscribed burning in stomach, the size of a dollar. Pain in left side, as if spleen were swollen. Soreness and tenderness of abdomen. Stitches in bowels and umbilical region.

stool_rectum.text: Constipation with ineffectual desire. Aching fulness in rectum after stool.
Constipation, with ineffectual disposition to go to stool. After stool, aching fulness in rectum.

urinary.text: Pressure on bladder and frequent desire to urinate; urine passed in small stream.
Pressure on bladder and frequent desire to urinate ; urine passed in a small stream.

male.text: Itching of glans penis and prepuce.

nose.text: Frequent violent sneezing, originating very high up in nose.

respiratory.text: VOICE AND LARYNX. TRACHEA AND BRONCHIA. [25] [Gymno.]. Smarting in larynx. Tickling in throat in morning, causing cough, increasing through day ; cough dry, hard and racking.

chest_heart.text: Pressure on chest and sternum. Pulse small and weak. Stitches in right breast and intercostal muscles.

extremities.text: Violent pain in left forearm, in radius, as if bones were crushed and broken. Pulsation in left index, as if panaritium were forming. Stinging pain in left knee-joint.

modalities.text: REST. POSITION. MOTION. [35] [Gymno.]. Desire to lean head on something. Repugnance to motion. Easily fatigued. Morning ; eyes feel sore ; tickling in throat. Afternoon : short walk fatigues him much. Aggravation in evening. Desire for heat ; wants to be near fire. Cold drinks very painful. Cold draughts of air cause toothache.

fever_chill.text: Desire for heat ; wants to be near the fire. Cold chills and pains in bowels (in descending colon). Perspiration of axillary region and palms of hands. Epidemic fevers, typhoid in character.
